playbook.intent: v1 token/component library -> v2 with semantic tokens, modes, versioned components, migrated consumers, drift dashboard.
playbook.scope: Design-system lead migrates a multi-app system from v1 to v2 over 12 weeks. Includes taxonomy refactor, semantic + mode tokens, component versioning, consumer migration, Storybook + docs refresh, governance, and a drift dashboard. Done when all priority consumer apps are on v2, drift remains under threshold for 4 weeks, and governance ceremony is running.

success-criteria.criterion: Token taxonomy refactored to semantic + modes (W3C-compliant)
All priority consumer apps migrated to v2
Drift dashboard live + under threshold for 4 consecutive weeks

stage.name: Audit v1
stage.intent: Know what you are about to break.

tasks.task: Inventory tokens + components in v1
Run a content audit across consumer apps
List apps + their token versions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every consumer app has a documented v1 footprint.

stage.name: v2 taxonomy
stage.intent: Design the semantic + mode token model.

tasks.task: Define semantic token tiers (core / alias / component)
Add light/dark + density modes
Pick a W3C-compliant token format

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when token tiers + modes are reviewed and signed off.

stage.name: v2 components

tasks.task: Rebuild base components on v2 tokens
Version components (semver) with breaking change notes
Update Storybook + docs as source of truth

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each base component has a versioned v2 release.

stage.name: Token distribution
stage.intent: Tokens land cleanly across iOS / Android / Web / Tailwind.

tasks.task: Wire token build to all platforms
Add Tailwind preset for web teams
Smoke-test on a sample app per platform

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sample apps render correctly on every platform.

stage.name: Consumer migration

tasks.task: Migrate flagship app first; document patterns
Open PRs for remaining apps with codemods
Pair with each app team for cutover

stage.decision-gate: Advance when migration percentage hits >=90% of priority apps.

stage.name: Drift dashboard

tasks.task: Wire drift scan (visual + token coverage) on PRs
Publish a live dashboard with drift metrics
Define drift threshold + alert rules

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when dashboard runs on every PR and produces alerts.

stage.name: Governance
stage.intent: v2 stays healthy without you in the loop daily.

tasks.task: Stand up monthly design-system governance review
Define proposal -> review -> ship process for changes
Publish deprecation policy for v1

outputs.output: Governance running; v1 deprecation timeline published

stage.decision-gate: Done when governance cycle has run twice without escalation.

extra.value: [Token tiers chosen ad-hoc -> renaming churn through migration, Codemods skipped -> consumer app migrations stall, Governance left informal -> v2 drifts back to v1 patterns]
['Are tokens the only source of visual decisions?', 'Is drift staying under threshold for >=4 weeks?', 'Is governance running on cadence?']

{human: faion get-content design-system-v1-to-v2-migration-12-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content design-system-v1-to-v2-migration-12-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content design-system-v1-to-v2-migration-12-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
